traits.name: Aggressive
traits.description: As a bonus action, the orc can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.

traits.name: Gruumsh's Fury
traits.description: The orc deals an extra 4 (1d8) damage when it hits with a weapon attack (included in the attacks).

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.description:
The orc eye of Gruumsh is a 3rd-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 11, +3 to hit with spell attacks). The orc has the following cleric spells prepared:

- Cantrips (at will): guidance, resistance, thaumaturgy
- 1st level (4 slots): bless, command
- 2nd level (2 slots): augury, spiritual weapon

actions.name: Spear
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (1d6 + 3 + 1d8) piercing damage, or 12 (1d8 + 3 + 1d8) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
